title: Upon Strut.
content:
Strut, once a foreman of a shop we knew;
    But turn'd a ladies' usher now, 'tis true:
    Tell me, has Strut got e're a title more?
    No; he's but foreman, as he was before.
meaning:
"Upon Strut." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
